description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees with vibrant purple foliage, creating a striking contrast with the white exterior walls. The house features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize a minimalist architectural style, while the open-plan interior layout is partially visible through the windows. The trees are closely clustered around the house, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or steps. The overall design blends contemporary residential architecture with lush landscaping.
description: A modern, white rectangular house with large windows, surrounded by dense purple-flowered trees. The flat roof and minimalist design contrast with the vibrant, natural landscaping.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by a dense canopy of purple-flowered trees, with the flat roof and some interior rooms visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade with large windows and the main entryway, framed by the surrounding trees.
description_view_2: The side of the house is visible, with more of the tree canopy and a small isolated tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: The rear of the house is mostly surrounded by trees, with only a small portion of the building visible through the foliage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or steps, minimalistic and flush with the facade
